result:
All green. The Epic is fully delivered, merged to `main`, and verified.

## Summary

I drove the task through Mandrel's full **plan → deliver** pipeline headlessly (`--yes`), producing a working notes REST API merged to `main`.

### Planning (`/plan --idea … --yes`) → Epic #110
- **Scope triage:** `borderline` → routed to the Epic path per the driver's directive.
- **Ideation off-ramp** (task fully specified) → one-pager → Epic body → **opened Epic #110**.
- **Clarity gate:** clear. **Phase 7:** authored PRD **#111** + Tech Spec **#112** (with `## Delivery Slicing`) + risk verdict (low, auto-proceed). Acceptance spec waived (`acceptance::n-a` + no BDD runner).
- **Phase 7.5** section gate passed. **Decomposition:** 2 Stories matching the slicing — **#113** (persistence store, wave 0) → **#114** (HTTP API, wave 1). Healthcheck passed → `agent::ready`.

### Delivery (`/deliver 110 --yes`)
- Committed the bench's pre-existing framework scaffolding so the tree was clean, then prepare/lease/preflight passed.
- **Wave loop:** dispatched #113 then #114 via Story sub-agents; both merged `--no-ff` into `epic/110`, branches reaped, Stories closed `agent::done`.
- **Close-validation** green; **epic-audit** + **code-review** both **0 🔴 / 0 🟠**; **retro** = clean sprint.
- **Finalize:** opened **PR #115**, closed planning tickets. No CI configured → **auto-merge armed and squash-merged to `main`** (`f16d1bf`). Epic #110 closed; local branches/main reconciled.

### Result — on `main`
- `src/store.js` (embedded SQLite via `node:sqlite`, `NOTES_DB_PATH`), `src/validation.js`, `src/server.js` (`node:http`), `src/index.js` (`PORT` default 3000), `npm start` script, plus tests.
- **14/14 unit tests pass**; **16/16 live HTTP checks pass**, including all status codes (201/200/204/400/404), validation, and **persistence across a real server restart**.

One framework-friction note logged: the spec-persist step mislabeled context tickets #111/#112 with `type::story`, tripping the decompose open-children guard; I stripped the erroneous label (the documented contract exempts `context::*`) and recorded it in `temp/friction-epic110-context-label.json`.

tool_input.command:
cd /private/var/folders/9_/_b_wsjg97pz469z8wzf02hhc0000gn/T/mandrel-bench-sandbox-b02j6A; export NOTES_DB_PATH="$(mktemp -d)/smoke.db"; export PORT=3137; echo "DB=$NOTES_DB_PATH PORT=$PORT"
node src/index.js & SRV=$!; sleep 1
echo "--- POST valid (expect 201) ---"; curl -s -o /tmp/post.json -w "HTTP %{http_code}\n" -X POST localhost:$PORT/notes -H 'content-type: application/json' -d '{"title":"first","body":"hello world"}'; cat /tmp/post.json; echo
ID=$(node -e 'console.log(require("/tmp/post.json").id)')
echo "--- POST invalid empty title (expect 400) ---"; curl -s -o /dev/null -w "HTTP %{http_code}\n" -X POST localhost:$PORT/notes -H 'content-type: application/json' -d '{"title":"","body":"x"}'
echo "--- POST malformed JSON (expect 400) ---"; curl -s -o /dev/null -w "HTTP %{http_code}\n" -X POST localhost:$PORT/notes -H 'content-type: application/json' -d '{not json'
echo "--- GET list (expect 200) ---"; curl -s -o /dev/null -w "HTTP %{http_code}\n" localhost:$PORT/notes
echo "--- GET /notes/$ID (expect 200) ---"; curl -s -o /dev/null -w "HTTP %{http_code}\n" localhost:$PORT/notes/$ID
echo "--- GET /notes/999999 (expect 404) ---"; curl -s -o /dev/null -w "HTTP %{http_code}\n" localhost:$PORT/notes/999999
echo "--- PUT /notes/$ID partial (expect 200) ---"; curl -s -o /dev/null -w "HTTP %{http_code}\n" -X PUT localhost:$PORT/notes/$ID -H 'content-type: application/json' -d '{"body":"updated body"}'
echo "--- PUT /notes/999999 (expect 404) ---"; curl -s -o /dev/null -w "HTTP %{http_code}\n" -X PUT localhost:$PORT/notes/999999 -H 'content-type: application/json' -d '{"body":"x"}'
echo "--- PUT invalid (expect 400) ---"; curl -s -o /dev/null -w "HTTP %{http_code}\n" -X PUT localhost:$PORT/notes/$ID -H 'content-type: application/json' -d '{"title":123}'
echo "=== RESTART server ==="; kill $SRV; wait $SRV 2>/dev/null; node src/index.js & SRV=$!; sleep 1
echo "--- After restart GET /notes/$ID (expect 200 + updated body) ---"; curl -s -w "\nHTTP %{http_code}\n" localhost:$PORT/notes/$ID
echo "--- DELETE /notes/$ID (expect 204) ---"; curl -s -o /dev/null -w "HTTP %{http_code}\n" -X DELETE localhost:$PORT/notes/$ID
echo "--- DELETE again (expect 404) ---"; curl -s -o /dev/null -w "HTTP %{http_code}\n" -X DELETE localhost:$PORT/notes/$ID
kill $SRV 2>/dev/null; wait $SRV 2>/dev/null; rm -rf "$(dirname "$NOTES_DB_PATH")"; echo "smoke done"

cd /private/var/folders/9_/_b_wsjg97pz469z8wzf02hhc0000gn/T/mandrel-bench-sandbox-b02j6A; echo "=== reconcile local main to origin/main ==="; git reset --hard origin/main 2>&1 | tail -1; git log --oneline -2; echo "=== verify working tree clean + files present ==="; git status --porcelain | wc -l; ls src test package.json 2>&1; echo "=== close Epic #110 ==="; gh issue close 110 --repo dsj1984/mandrel-bench-sandbox --comment "Delivered and merged via PR #115 (squash-merged to main, commit f16d1bf). Both Stories (#113 store, #114 HTTP API) closed; PRD #111 and Tech Spec #112 closed. All acceptance criteria verified (14 unit tests + 16 live HTTP checks incl. persistence-across-restart)." 2>&1 | tail -2; gh issue view 110 --repo dsj1984/mandrel-bench-sandbox --json state -q '.state'
